title: Path
subtitle: Path manipulation: joining, splitting, absolute/relative conversion, and tilde expansion.

members.name: absolute
members.description: Returns an absolute version of the path.

members.name: hasDriveLetters
members.description: returns true if the platform requires DOS C: style drive letters.

members.name: isPathAbsolute
members.description: Returns true if path is absolute, false if it is relative.

members.name: thisSourceFilePath
members.description: Uses call message label to return an absolute path to the file that contains the sender.

members.name: with
members.description: Returns a new Path object for the given Sequence.
